title: Financial Systems Integration and Automation
problemStatement: Fragmented financial data and slow invoicing created revenue leakage, delayed decisions, and weak margin visibility.
solution: Architected an integrated data model, automated invoicing workflows, and built Project Pulse and BV Pulse dashboards for timely financial oversight.
impact: Reduced invoice processing time by 60 percent, improved receivables efficiency, and enabled stronger financial visibility for leadership decisions.
leadershipValue: Tied finance operations to reporting discipline so commercial and delivery leaders could act with faster margin and cash-flow insight.

interactionFiles.label: Interactive case brief
interactionFiles.description: View the finance operating model, invoice automation logic, and oversight dashboard lens.
